song_name: Take Your Time Do It Right
tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: Take Your Time Do It Right

performance.name: Soul Train
performance.comment: This doesn't include the Arp Odyssey synth Bass Sound in the intro

content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]Em/G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]              [ch]Em/B[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Ooh,    babe,  take your time, come on ba-by[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em/G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]              [ch]Em/B[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Ooh,    babe,  take your time.[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
You know you are just low down.[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
You've been  work- in too hard,[/tab]
and that's a fact.
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Sit back and re-lax a while,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
take some time to laugh and smile.[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                                       [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Ba-by, we can do it, take the time, do it right.  We can do it, hey babe, do it to-night.[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Lay your heavy load down[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
So we can stop and take five.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
It seems we never take the time to do[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
All the things we want to, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                                       [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Ba-by, we can do it, take the time, do it right.  We can do it, hey babe, do it to-night.[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
The love I feel for you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
You feel for me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]                      
One life is all we have to live.[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Our love is all we have to give, yeah.[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                                       [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Ba-by, we can do it, take the time, do it right.  We can do it, hey babe, do it to-night.[/tab]


[Verse4]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
There are so many things for us[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
To do and see, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Let's take some time to be alone.[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Lock the door pull out the phone, yeah.[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                                       [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
And ba-by, we can do it, take the time, do it right.  We can do it, hey babe, do it to-night.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                                       [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Ba-by, we can do it, take the time, do it right.  We can do it, hey babe, do it to-night.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                                       [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Ba-by, we can do it, take the time, do it right.  We can do it, hey babe, do it to-night.[/tab]
